title: goal-contract
description: Schema for the goal-contract plan-seat variant block (issue #872, design decision 872-D2). This is the single authority for every enum and required-field set in the contract; no consumer (goal-contract-core.ps1, frame-validate-core.ps1, orchestra-spine.ps1, plan-authoring/SKILL.md) re-encodes these values.

schema_version.description: The accepted schema_version set. Callers read this enum rather than hard-coding accepted versions.

issue.description: The GitHub issue number this contract belongs to.

contract_hash.description: 64-hex sha256 digest per 872-D3. Required so a draft (literal 64-zero placeholder) is structurally distinguishable from an unset field, and an approved contract is distinguishable from a draft only by the digest no longer being the placeholder.

targets.description: Verification targets. minItems: 1 -- a zero-target contract checks nothing, and both AC-coverage directions would pass vacuously on it.

falsifier.description: Optional in schema (872-D4): what a vacuous satisfaction of this check would look like and why this check is not it. Plan-authoring makes this conditionally mandatory for targets flagged by a letter-vs-intent stress-test finding; the schema itself stays permissive.

source.description: Reserved provenance field, e.g. bdd:S3. null when not yet populated.

invariants.description: Floor: both named literals below are required; repo-specific entries may be appended.

general_experience_standard.description: Canonical clause and four guardrails, verbatim from #848 D8.

halt_conditions.description: Exactly the five halt-condition literals, each exactly once. Expressed via items-enum + minItems/maxItems/uniqueItems rather than a single const array so the order is not load-bearing.

tokens.description: Token ceiling, or an advisory string per #871 finding.
